name: CurveOffsetCornerStyle
summary: Defines enumerated values for all implemented corner styles in curve offsets.

enum_values.name: Sharp
enum_values.summary: Offsets and extends curves with a straight line until they intersect.

enum_values.name: Round
enum_values.summary: Offsets and fillets curves with an arc of radius equal to the offset distance.

enum_values.name: Smooth
enum_values.summary: Offsets and connects curves with a smooth (G1 continuity) curve.

enum_values.name: Chamfer
enum_values.summary: Offsets and connects curves with a straight line between their endpoints.
